text: Here, I am struck by the intersection of intellect and creativity. The glass-walled meeting room exudes an air of focus and collaboration, detached from the outside bustle. The nearby exhibit, splashed with bold colors and emblazoned with "R+D," beckons me to reflect on the dynamic relationship between research, development, and human ingenuity. I feel curious and invigorated, my mind awakened by the promise of discovery and the flourishing of collective thought.
